commands.repair_reason: Human maintainer review is needed for the protected label and compatibility-sensitive public oc-path CLI/API expansion; no narrow automated repair remains from this review.; Cleared: The diff touches oc-path parser/CLI/docs/tests only, adds no dependencies or workflow/package execution surface, and the parsed JSON path hardens non-finite values. (sha=4af91776f9f2dbeb8a3c3100efa420cbd5befd10)
commands.review_summary:
This PR updates the bundled oc-path CLI, docs, and tests so JSON/JSONC paths can normalize extra slash segments into dotted JSON traversal and `openclaw path set` can opt into parsed JSON leaf replacement with `--value-json`.

PR surface: Source +100, Tests +99, Docs +9. Total +208 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows `parseOcPath` throws `OC_PATH_TOO_DEEP` for slash paths with more than four structural segments, and the PR body/test diff covers the reported `openclaw.json` path shape.
commands.review_followup: Human maintainer review is needed for the protected label and compatibility-sensitive public oc-path CLI/API expansion; no narrow automated repair remains from this review.
